contexts.name: repositories
contexts.responsibility: Repository identity, ownership, profile, visibility, and lifecycle.

contexts.name: repository-access
contexts.responsibility: Repository grants, roles, principals, and effective access.

contexts.name: repository-features
contexts.responsibility: Repository product feature enablement and configuration.

contexts.name: repository-metadata
contexts.responsibility: Topics, custom-property values, and social preview metadata.

contexts.name: repository-relations
contexts.responsibility: Fork, template, generated-from, and redirect relationships.

contexts.name: issues
contexts.responsibility: Issue lifecycle, assignment, hierarchy, transfer, and work tracking.

contexts.name: work-taxonomy
contexts.responsibility: Repository labels, milestones, and work classification.

contexts.name: discussions
contexts.responsibility: Discussion categories, questions, answers, polls, pins, and lifecycle.

contexts.name: conversations
contexts.responsibility: Comments, reactions, mentions, revisions, and conversation locks.

contexts.name: community-health
contexts.responsibility: Community profile and contribution-resource completeness.

contexts.name: moderation
contexts.responsibility: Content reports, interaction limits, and moderation decisions.

contexts.name: repository-engagement
contexts.responsibility: Repository stars and public engagement signals.

contexts.name: subscriptions
contexts.responsibility: Repository and conversation notification subscription preferences.

contexts.name: releases
contexts.responsibility: Release metadata, publication lifecycle, and asset references.

contexts.name: repository-integrations
contexts.responsibility: Repository webhook configuration and delivery policy.

contexts.name: repository-search
contexts.responsibility: Permission-filtered repository search projections.

contexts.name: repository-activity
contexts.responsibility: User-visible repository activity timelines.

contexts.name: repository-insights
contexts.responsibility: Repository product statistics, traffic, and trend projections.

contexts.name: identity-directory
contexts.responsibility: Actor, user, team, and organization reference resolution.

contexts.name: authorization-policy
contexts.responsibility: Application authorization decisions across GitHub resource policies.

contexts.name: notification-delivery
contexts.responsibility: Inbox, email, push, and notification state delivery.

contexts.name: media-storage
contexts.responsibility: Media and asset references used by repository product features.

contexts.name: audit-log
contexts.responsibility: Security, governance, and administrative audit records.

contexts.name: messaging-outbox
contexts.responsibility: Reliable publication of domain and integration events.
